content:
Ilana Ilana Krantz-Morrison fun iṣiro iye ipari n ṣeduro yipada lati awoṣe idagbasoke ailopin (perpetuity growth model) si awoṣe idinku atunṣe apapọ (multi-stage or declining adjustment model) nigbati iyatọ laarin ROIC (Return on Invested Capital) ati WACC (Weighted Average Cost of Capital) ba lọ silẹ ni isalẹ 200 bps (2%).

Ninu ọran rẹ, iyatọ ROIC-WACC jẹ 180 bps, eyi ti o wa ni isalẹ 200 bps. Nitorina, ni ibamu si ilana yii, o yẹ ki o ṣe iyipada lati awoṣe idagbasoke ailopin si awoṣe idinku atunṣe apapọ fun iṣiro iye ipari DCF ọdun yii.

Ni ṣoki: Bẹẹni, o yẹ ki o ṣe iyipada
